firmware.title: Tcard_AD10-15.1.3.115SP05-GL001PF001AZ
firmware.description:
It is recommended to perform OTA upgrade when the battery is over 50%.

Update Version:
AD10-15.1.3.115SP05(GL001PF001AZ)

Android Version:
Upgraded from Android 14 to Android 15 for enhanced security, more features, and a better user experience.

OS Version:
Upgraded from HiOS 14.5.0 to HiOS 15.1.3 for a smarter user interface and a refreshed look for your device.

Home Screen
Supported resizing certain app icons and folders to 1x2, 2x1, or 2x2 via long press and drag, enhancing home screen icon personalization.
Supported effect previews for home screen grid adjustment and page turn settings.
Optimized animations for unlocking the home screen and app launch/exit transitions.

Notification Center
Added privacy protection for lock screen notifications, showing content only after face unlock. Introduced adaptive notification settings that automatically reduce volume for high-frequency notifications over short periods.
Optimized screen wake intervals and animation design for notifications, balancing notification timeliness and a smooth visual experience.
Supported displaying silent call notifications from WhatsApp and similar apps on the lock screen; optimized notification animations.

Control Center
Added music cards to improve the interaction experience.
Optimized page layout and smoothness for a more refined display.

AI Suggestions
Added the memory card that alerts users when memory is low and offers one-tap memory cleanup.
Added data usage suggestions to notify users when data is running low, making it easier to manage monthly data consumption.

Font
Added the TransSans font and supported variable font weight adjustment for a more comfortable reading experience.

Phone
Added support for merging duplicate contacts and removing duplicates.
Optimized Call Log to support the display of ringing time.
Optimized dual SIM call settings in the contact details interface.
Added type identifier for missed call notifications in Do Not Disturb/Silent modes.
Optimized visuals in other aspects.

Messages
Added support for Dynamic Port to display SMS verification codes.

Dual System
Strong isolation: One device, two separate spaces. Data in the main and second systems is fully isolated, with independent fingerprints and passwords supported for each.
Seamless switching: You can enter the corresponding system directly from the lock screen using different fingerprints or passwords. Switching between systems is discreet and leaves no trace, striking a perfect balance between work and privacy.

Improved system performance
Optimized the memory recycling strategy to boost app loading speed.
Added priority scheduling for key tasks to enhance the system running smoothness under high CPU loads.

Games
Supported voice control for Game Assistant Panel to enhance operational efficiency.
Supported setting screen refresh rates on Game Assistant Panel.

Instant Transfer
Added Instant Transfer for quick transfer across phones and tablets of the same brand when images, videos, and files were shared, without data usage and installation.

NFC
Improved NFC accidental read prevention. If NFC card reading is triggered repeatedly within a short period, NFC will be temporarily disabled. You can also set a specific reading range for NFC. A reminder is shown when a card is detected on the back of the phone for an extended period, helping avoid interference with normal NFC use.

App Twin
Optimized App Twin to support dual instances of Outlook.
Fixed the issue of non-cloned apps appearing in the app management list in Settings.
Improved the cross-app sharing experience for dual apps.

App Lock
Optimized for the issue where the App Lock unlock screen did not support floating windows.
